activities_projects.title: Story Recall Activity
activities_projects.objective: Understand the basic events of the story
steps: Read the story 'The Little Girl'
Write the name of the main character
Write who Kezia was afraid of

activities_projects.title: Character Identification
activities_projects.objective: Identify the characters in the story
steps: Write the names Kezia, her father, mother, and grandmother
Write one line about each character

activities_projects.title: Father and Daughter Relationship
activities_projects.objective: Understand the relationship between Kezia and her father
steps: Write how Kezia felt about her father at the beginning
Write how she felt about him at the end

activities_projects.title: Vocabulary Activity
steps: Find five new words from the chapter
Write their meanings
Use them in simple sentences

activities_projects.title: Event Sequencing
activities_projects.objective: Understand the order of events in the story
steps: Write four important events from the story
Arrange them in the correct order

activities_projects.title: Reading Practice
steps: Choose a paragraph from the story
Read it aloud clearly
Practice correct pronunciation

activities_projects.title: Draw Your Favorite Scene
steps: Choose a scene you liked from the story
Draw the scene
Write one sentence describing it

activities_projects.title: Feelings Activity
steps: Write how Kezia felt when her father punished her
Write how she felt when he comforted her during the nightmare

activities_projects.title: Family Discussion
steps: Write three ways parents show love for their children
Share your ideas in class

activities_projects.title: Moral of the Story
activities_projects.objective: Identify the message of the story
steps: Think about what Kezia learned about her father
Write the lesson of the story in 3–4 sentences
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Understands the theme of love and understanding in families
